tagline: Locally Owned and Operated Swimming Pool Service

hero.headline:
Honest Pool Care That Saves You
Money
hero.subheadline: Other companies replace parts you don't need. Pooltastic diagnoses the real problem and fixes it right the first time — saving San Antonio families thousands. Jason and Stephanie treat every pool like their own.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a Team<br class="hidden md:block"> That Actually Cares
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to emergency repairs, Jason and Stephanie handle every detail so you can enjoy your backyard without the worry.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and precise chemical balancing every single week. Your pool stays swim-ready so you never have to think twice.

cards.title: Scheduled Maintenance
cards.description: Custom preventive maintenance programs that catch small issues before they become expensive problems. We protect your investment season after season.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Honest diagnosis of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. We fix the actual problem — not upsell parts you don't need.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of pumps, filters, heaters, lighting, and automation. Quality workmanship from a team with 15+ years of hands-on experience.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precision chemical balancing that keeps your water crystal clear, safe, and gentle on skin and eyes. No guesswork, just science.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Care
cards.description: Spring openings, winterization, and storm recovery services tailored to the Texas Hill Country climate. Your pool stays protected year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Call or Text Us
steps.description: Reach Jason or Stephanie directly. We'll ask a few questions about your pool, give you an honest assessment, and schedule a convenient time — usually within days.

steps.title: We Diagnose & Fix It Right
steps.description: Our licensed technicians arrive on schedule, identify the real issue, and fix it properly the first time. No unnecessary replacements, no inflated bills.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool Again
steps.description: Your pool stays clean, safe, and equipment runs like new. And if anything ever feels off, one call to Stephanie and we make it right — that's our word.

about.label: Why San Antonio Trusts Us
about.headline: We're Jason & Stephanie — Your Neighbors, Not a Faceless Company
about.description: Since 2011, Pooltastic has been the pool service San Antonio families call when they want the truth — not a sales pitch. Jason diagnoses the real problem and fixes it right. Stephanie makes sure you're informed every step of the way. Together, they've built a reputation on honesty, saving customers thousands by repairing what others would replace. Licensed by the State of Texas (TICL 476) and serving communities across the Hill Country.

features.title: Honest Diagnoses, Real Savings
features.description: We find the actual problem and fix it. Other companies replace entire pumps for a wiring issue — we won't. That's saved our customers thousands.

features.title: No Contracts. Ever.
features.description: We earn your trust every single visit. No long-term lock-ins, no cancellation fees, no pressure. Just great pool care, plain and simple.

features.title: Direct Access to Owners
features.description: When you call Pooltastic, you get Jason or Stephanie — not a call center. Real people who know your pool and genuinely care about getting it right.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool. Change or cancel anytime — no contracts, no penalties, no fine print.

guarantee.headline: Our "Fix It Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call Stephanie and we'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. We've built our reputation on doing right by our neighbors — and we plan to keep it that way.

faqs.question: How fast can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are on the schedule within 3-5 days. For urgent issues like a broken pump or green pool, we often respond same-day or next-day. Just call or text (210) 538-9690.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when you come?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our San Antonio customers give us gate access and go about their day. We'll send you a summary after every visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pooltastic holds Texas License TICL 476 and is regulated by the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation. We carry full liability coverage for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: Will you try to sell me equipment I don't need?
faqs.answer: Absolutely not. Honest diagnosis is our biggest differentiator. We've saved customers thousands by finding the real issue — like a simple wiring fix instead of a full pump replacement. We only recommend what you actually need.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve San Antonio, Boerne, Bulverde, Canyon Lake, Fair Oaks, La Vernia, New Braunfels, Seguin, and Spring Branch — covering the greater Hill Country region.

testimonials.name: Kirsten F.
testimonials.text: After storms, our pump quit working. Another company said to replace the entire pump. Pooltastic found it was a wiring issue, saving us thousands of dollars. Jason and Stephanie are fantastic to work with.

testimonials.name: Benjamin B.
testimonials.text: Stephanie and Jason exceed expectations every time. They repaired damaged equipment after a winter freeze when parts were unavailable and replaced our pool cleaner pump. They even resolved a pool light issue before July 4th.

testimonials.name: Larry D.
testimonials.text: Called with a problem and Stephanie texted back and walked me through solutions professionally. She even declined payment despite saving me money. Outstanding service.

benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
